problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
mechanism: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier
hypothesis: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier may resolve Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
